所有程序包|所有类和接口

E

Entrant - com.example.eventparticipation中的类
Model class representing a single entrant record stored in an event waitlist.
Entrant() - 类的构造器 com.example.eventparticipation.Entrant
Required empty constructor for Firestore deserialization.
Entrant(String, String, String, String, String, GeoPoint, Date) - 类的构造器 com.example.eventparticipation.Entrant
Creates a fully populated entrant object.
EntrantAdapter - com.example.eventparticipation中的类
RecyclerView adapter used to display entrants in the organizer waitlist screen.
EntrantAdapter(List<Entrant>) - 类的构造器 com.example.eventparticipation.EntrantAdapter
Creates an adapter for the provided entrant list.
EntrantListActivity - com.example.eventparticipation中的类
Organizer screen for viewing entrants who joined a specific event waitlist.
EntrantListActivity() - 类的构造器 com.example.eventparticipation.EntrantListActivity
 
Event - com.example.eventparticipation中的类
Model class representing an event owned by an organizer.
Event() - 类的构造器 com.example.eventparticipation.Event
Required empty constructor for Firestore deserialization.
Event(String, String, String, Date, int, Date, String, int, int, int, String) - 类的构造器 com.example.eventparticipation.Event
Creates a fully populated event instance.
EventAdapter - com.example.eventparticipation中的类
RecyclerView adapter for displaying events on the organizer dashboard.
EventAdapter(List<Event>, OnEventClickListener) - 类的构造器 com.example.eventparticipation.EventAdapter
Creates an event adapter.
